form.formComment: Has finished eighth at the last two runs, both at Healesville, the latest when beaten 9 lengths behind Spanish Fawn over 300m. Forget the latest effort. Among the chances.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when a 14 length sixth (24.75) at Bendigo. Previous form sound including a win three back at Warragul. Looks a key chance here on best and given another chance.

form.formComment: Found the going tougher last start when third over 390m at Warrnambool. That followed a win two back in 22.35 beating Bounding Betty over 390m at Warrnambool. Will not find this easy. Not keen.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when second (23.29) over 400m at this track. Tricky draw to overcome but in the mix on his best form.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 3rd on March 12 over 400m at this track behind Aston Maribel beaten 2 lengths (22.97) in a T3 Grade 7. Close to the speed and boxed on well at the latest run. Key chance again.
